description: Refactor prompt loading to support prompt inheritance and composition
prompt: The current prompt loading system requires duplicating common sections across prompts. Refactor it to support a base prompt that can be extended by specific prompts, allowing composition and reducing duplication.

key_changes: Extract common prompt sections into base.txt
Update existing prompts to extend base
success_criteria: All existing prompts work without changes to call sites
New prompts can extend base using special syntax
Tests cover inheritance and composition cases
No duplication of common prompt sections
testing_strategy: Unit tests for prompt loading with inheritance
Integration tests that existing workflow stages still work
Verify composed prompts contain all expected sections

notes: Tests ability to design clean refactoring with backward compatibility
